since_last: 49% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.86%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.80% · Gold +1.11% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 49% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.86%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.86%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.60%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRNC is the standout at +5.13%
cards.body: Leaders: CRNC +5.13%, AMAT +3.79%, ARM +3.75%, MU +3.74%, LRCX +3.67%. Laggards: DLR -3.73%, EQIX -3.58%, CRM -2.69%, AVAV -2.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.28% at $150.2
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.28% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
